summary: Added explicit bulk source-triangulation gates to the sarf and nahw skill entry points.
safety_rules_encoded: A source-triangulation table row is not automatically a hover decision.
Auto-safe rows require root/POS agreement, one applicable sense/form, no norm_strict collision, and no context-sensitive trigger.
Form, voice, person, nominal/verbal, multi-sense, function-word, i'rab, negation, idafa, jar-majrur, and referent-sensitive rows require two-vote or owner review.
Index misses are resolver/index candidates, not free reindex applies.
Owner-gated rows keep blank authored wording fields until a human writes or approves them.
Public hover output remains src=qamus and kind=authored with no external source names.
